market_pulse.one_liner: Tech sell-off deepens as AI memory fears overshadow Samsung's profit surge, with VIX spiking 4.7% and defensive rotation evident.
market_pulse.sector_rotation: Rotation out of semiconductors and AI-related names into value and energy, with oversold signals flashing in both tech (NVDA, ORCL) and energy (COP, SLB).

opportunities.thesis: RSI 29.1 deeply oversold, below MA; potential mean-reversion bounce despite AI memory headwinds.
opportunities.catalyst: Bounce from oversold RSI with any positive AI capex news or short-covering.

opportunities.thesis: Massive call buying detected: $57.4M premium on $708 strike (630.6x avg vol) and $30.1M on $713 strike, signaling institutional bullish positioning.
opportunities.catalyst: Follow-through from options flow; potential tech stabilization.

opportunities.thesis: Unusual put flow with $1.1M premium on $270 strike (464x avg vol) and $1M on $275 strike, indicating downside protection demand.
opportunities.catalyst: Break below $270 put strike on consumer spending fears or broad market weakness.

risk_alerts.alert: Escalating Ukraine-Russia tensions after Putin rejects Zelensky meeting; potential energy supply disruptions.
AI memory and chip stocks falling despite Samsung profit beat; sector rotation could accelerate if NVDA breaks below $740.
VIX up 4.69% to 16.3, signaling rising anxiety; a move above 18 would confirm risk-off shift.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Putin says there is 'no point' meeting Zelensky over ending Ukraine war
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Prolongs conflict, sustaining energy and commodity price pressures, impacting inflation-sensitive assets.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Raises Black Sea shipping risks, potentially disrupting grain/oil flows and lifting commodity volatility.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Astronauts return to ISS after sheltering during air leak repair attempt
geopolitical_impact.rationale: No direct market impact; limited to aerospace sentiment.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Domestic political noise with negligible cross-market effects.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Humanitarian tragedy but no financial market implications.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Iran footballers issued US visas for World Cup, says White House
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Sports diplomacy with minimal immediate market impact.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Zelenskyy: Putin choosing war by rejecting offer for in-person talks
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Reinforces prolonged conflict narrative, supporting defense and energy sectors, weighing on risk appetite.

geopolitical_impact.headline: Trump hails jobs surge, says Iran talks ‘going well’
geopolitical_impact.rationale: Positive labor market signal but Iran diplomacy could ease oil supply fears if talks progress.

immediate: Monitor VIX for break above 18 as risk-off trigger; consider buying put spreads on QQQ if VIX spikes.
Set alerts on NVDA $740 and AMZN $270 for potential entry on breakdown/breakout.
